mapper.sql: A.POLL_ID AS pollId, A.POLL_NM AS pollNm, A.POLL_BGNDE AS pollBeginDe, A.POLL_ENDDE AS pollEndDe, A.POLL_KND AS pollKindCode, A.POLL_DSUSE_ENNC AS pollDsuseYn, A.POLL_ATMC_DSUSE_ENNC AS pollAutoDsuseYn, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm, (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS frstRegisterNm

if.test: searchCondition == 'POLL_NM' or searchCondition == null or searchCondition == ''

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_ONLINE_POLL_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.POLL_BGNDE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ONLINE_POLL_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_ONLINE_POLL_MANAGE A WHERE A.POLL_ID = #{pollId}
SELECT POLL_ID AS pollId, POLL_IEM_ID AS pollIemId, POLL_IEM_NM AS pollIemNm FROM TB_ONLINE_POLL_IEM WHERE POLL_ID = #{pollId} ORDER BY POLL_IEM_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ONLINE_POLL_MANAGE (POLL_ID, POLL_NM, POLL_BGNDE, POLL_ENDDE, POLL_KND, POLL_DSUSE_ENNC, POLL_ATMC_DSUSE_ENNC, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{pollId}, #{pollNm}, #{pollBeginDe}, #{pollEndDe}, #{pollKindCode}, #{pollDsuseYn}, #{pollAutoDsuseYn}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO TB_ONLINE_POLL_IEM (POLL_ID, POLL_IEM_ID, POLL_IEM_NM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{pollId}, #{pollIemId}, #{pollIemNm}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ONLINE_POLL_IEM SET POLL_IEM_NM = #{pollIemNm} WHERE POLL_ID = #{pollId} AND POLL_IEM_ID = #{pollIemId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_ONLINE_POLL_IEM WHERE POLL_ID = #{pollId} AND POLL_IEM_ID = #{pollIemId}
